title: abutilon × luteum-album
intro: Abutilon × luteum-album is a hybrid plant species within the Malvaceae family, derived from the cross between Abutilon luteum and Abutilon album. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Consuming Abutilon × luteum-album has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Abutilon × luteum-album can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, but further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
